OUR IDENTITY

Why
"Answer is Yes!"

When others see obstacles, we see opportunities. When others say "too hard," we say "watch this." This is not optimism. This is conviction.

MISSION

To be the institution that says
yes to the future.

We build the foundational technologies upon which the next human civilization will stand. AI. Quantum. Robotics. Materials. Space. Climate. Biology. Security.

Yes.

ALWAYS

OUR PEOPLE

Builders who refused to
accept "no."

We are scientists, engineers, and builders who came to A AI because this is the only place where the default answer to every moonshot is the same: "Let's try. Answer is Yes."

THE LEADERSHIP

Our Founders

Kaushal Banginwar

FOUNDER

Kaushal drives the architectural vision and technical strategy at A AI. With a deep background in advanced systems and artificial intelligence, he leads the engineering efforts building our foundational technologies to answer the world's greatest challenges.

Akshay Warghade

FOUNDER

Akshay spearheads A AI's strategic direction and business execution. A passionate visionary, he unites rigorous research with daring moonshot goals to ensure our innovations create massive, real-world impact across every industry.

OUR HEADQUARTERS

Where the Future is Built

Located at the intersection of innovation and execution.
